purpose: Record combat-only feat pass for Acrobatic Strike, Momentum Strike, and Power Blast.

implementedEntries.name: Acrobatic Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: After a successful Tumble that avoided an attack of opportunity, exposes a +2 competence attack option only when the attack workflow supplies successfulTumbleAvoidedOpportunityAttack/acrobaticStrikeAvailable context and the attack is against the relevant foe before end of current turn.

implementedEntries.name: Momentum Strike
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes a +1 weapon die melee attack option only while mounted/on a speeder bike and when the mount or vehicle has already moved at least its speed this turn.

implementedEntries.name: Power Blast
implementedEntries.mechanic: Active ranged slider up to BAB: subtract selected value from ranged attacks and add same value to ranged damage. Runtime suppresses damage bonus for Area Attacks, objects, and vehicles, and applies the special -5 attack penalty for Strength below 13 with non-vehicle weapons.

automationBoundary.Acrobatic Strike: Tumble/AoO workflow must supply the successful tumble and target-scoped state; this pass does not create a Tumble movement workflow.
automationBoundary.Momentum Strike: Mount/speeder workflow must supply mounted and moved-at-least-speed context flags.
automationBoundary.Power Blast: Attack option UI must supply selected slider value and enforce Swift Action timing; runtime handles attack/damage math and exclusions.
